common.exitAppMessage: Are you sure you want to exit the app?

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.invalidUrl: Invalid URL format. Example: example.com:8080 or http://example.com:8080
login.loginSuccess: Login successful! Please press the "Update All Data" button on the home page to download content.
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.demoError: An error occurred while starting demo mode.

home.description: Live TV, Series, Movies and hundreds of content…
home.updateInfo: * To update content, press the icon on the card.
home.syncError: An error occurred during the update.

liveTv.title: Channels
liveTv.categoriesNotFound: Categories not found. Please update from the home page.

movieDetail.loadError: An error occurred while loading the movie
movieDetail.trailerNotFound: No trailer found for this movie.
movieDetail.trailerError: An error occurred while loading the trailer.
movieDetail.youtubeRequired: YouTube app is required to watch trailers. Please install YouTube from Google Play Store.

player.resumeMessage: Would you like to resume from ({{time}})?
player.httpError401:
🔑 Authorization error.

Username or password may be incorrect.
Please sign out and sign in again.
player.httpError403:
🚫 Access denied (403 Forbidden).

Possible reasons:
• Subscription may have expired
• Active session on another device
• Your IPTV provider may have blocked access
• Your IP address may have changed
player.httpError404:
🔍 Content not found (404).

This video is not available on the server.
Content may have been removed.
player.httpError500:
⚠️ Server error (500).

There is a problem with the IPTV server.
Please try again later.
player.httpError502:
⚠️ Server not responding (502).

The IPTV server is currently unreachable.
player.httpError503:
⚠️ Server under maintenance (503).

Please try again later.
player.httpErrorGeneric:
⚠️ Server error (HTTP {{code}}).

Please try again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.updateContentConfirm: All content (Channels, Movies, Series) will be re-downloaded from the server. This may take some time depending on your internet speed.
settings.updateError: An error occurred during the update.
settings.clearHistoryConfirm: Your watch history and resume points will be deleted. Are you sure?
settings.clearHistoryError: An error occurred while clearing history.
settings.clearFavoritesConfirm: All your favorites will be deleted. Are you sure?
settings.clearFavoritesError: An error occurred while clearing favorites.
settings.clearCacheConfirm: App cache will be cleared. This may take a moment.
settings.clearCacheError: An error occurred while clearing cache.
settings.serverChangeConfirm:
When server changes, all data, favorites and watch history will be deleted. Data will be re-downloaded from the new server.

Are you sure?
settings.connectionError: Could not connect to the new server address. Please check the URL.
settings.serverChangeSuccess: Server address updated and old data cleared. You can download new content by pressing the "Update" button on the home page.
settings.serverChangeError: An error occurred while changing the server. Please try again.
settings.audioBoostSubtitle: Boost TV speaker volume through software
settings.audioBoostWarning: ⚠️ Audio distortion may occur at high levels
settings.languageRestart: Language change will be applied immediately.
settings.logoutConfirmMessage: All your data and settings will be deleted. Are you sure you want to log out?
settings.bufferModeDesc: Select video loading setting based on your internet speed
settings.audioBoostDescAlt: Increase volume for low audio streams
settings.audioModalDesc: Automatically selected if this language is available
settings.serverUrlHint: * Username and password will not change

aiAssistant.welcomeMessage: Hello! I am your movie and series assistant. What would you like to watch today? (e.g., "90s action", "I want to laugh")
aiAssistant.errorMsg: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
aiAssistant.placeholder: What would you like to watch?
